/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/FTRRECORDED/SAWD/CTORD:$30,000 BOND REINSTATED/X:NO FORFEITURE OR EXONERATION AT THIS TIME/X:AS A CONDITION OF PREVIOUSLY POSTED BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:03-04-22PTC DATE IS ADVANCED TO 02-15-22/DOPU:NO HOME DETENTION VIOLATIONS/

/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 12-10-21,/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PRETRIAL/LDTR:01-03-22/X:DEFENDANT HAS POSTED BOND AND IS CURRENTLY OUT OFCUSTODY, AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:12-21-21 TRIAL CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PTC & RECEIPT OF ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:DEFENDANT IS AMENABLE TO ICR PROGRAM/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ACM 5 TIMES A WEEK FOR SUPERVISION; PTD TO DETERMINE WHETHER CHECK-IN WILL BE IN PERSON OR BY PHONE, DEFENDANT IS ALSO ORDERED TO PARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT TREATMENT WITH MISSION COUNCIL/X:DEFENDANT ADMONISHED TO ABIDE BY ALL PROTECTIVE ORDERS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSWILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:HOME DETENTION REQUEST BY THE PEOPLE IS DENIED/GTWM//VD:JURY TRIAL ON 11-15-21/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:NO EM OR CPO VIOLATIONS/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:DEFT BAIL MOTION/MO DENIED/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THEVICTIM/X:AND WOULD NOT REASONABLY ASSURE THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT TRIAL,/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/LDTR:11-22-21/X:11-02-21 PTC & 11-15-21 TRIAL CONFIRMED,/DOP/
